note: Employment is defined in line with the [13th ICLS](#dod:13-icls) and includes the production of goods for own use, such as subsistence farming.
title: Labor force participation rates: modeled vs. national estimates
subtitle: Share of the working-age population who are economically active (employed or unemployed). [National estimates](#dod:ilo-national-estimates) are based on each country's own data collection and definitions, while [modeled estimates](#dod:ilo-modelled-estimates) are produced by the International Labour Organization (ILO) using statistical methods to improve comparability across countries and over time.
